params.name: Chair of Busby
params.description:
On Jul 17, 1702, this cursed chair killed its first owner.

Bruce strangled his father-in-law who sat on his chair. When he was given the death sentence, he made a curse, "Those who sit on my chair shall die." After that, the cursed chair took 63 lives. They all died from accidents a few hours after sitting on this chair.

[Victim List]

The cleaner, who stood on the chair to do cleaning, fell and died. British airman Baylord died in a car accident. Construction worker fell from the roof and die …
